parts.title: Transcript
parts.annotated_transcript_html:
Speaker 1 (Miss Russell): Hello?

Speaker 2 (James): Hi, Miss Russell. It's James here from Colvin Lettings, just giving you a call back.

Speaker 1 (Miss Russell): Oh, hello, James. Thanks very much. What have you got for me?

Speaker 2 (James): I found a couple of places which might be suitable. OK? The first is in the Old Port. Great location, two-bed flat, available on the 12th. It also comes with quite a large garden, which would be great in summer.

Speaker 1 (Miss Russell): OK. And how much is it?

Speaker 2 (James): It's £1,250 per calendar month.

Speaker 1 (Miss Russell): Ah, that is quite a bit out of my budget.

Speaker 2 (James): Yeah, well, that's the area for you. These days, it's very up and coming. I do have another place in the Old Port, which is a bit more affordable. It comes in at £1,000 a month.

Speaker 1 (Miss Russell): That's a bit more suitable for me.

Speaker 2 (James): Yes, but I'm afraid this property is only a one-bed. But it's as spacious as a two-bed, really.

Speaker 2 (James): And the final property I have for you is actually in the centre. Now, I know you said that you didn't really want to live around there, but this flat happens to be on a quiet little side street and it's a two-bed at £9.50 a month, available from the 11th.

Speaker 1 (Miss Russell): OK. I could take a look, I suppose.

Speaker 2 (James): Also, this one comes with a parking space, which is very unusual in that area. When would be a good time for you to view the properties?
